mapper.select: /* AccountingMainMapper.getAcComCodeList */ SELECT HQ_OFFICE_CD , AC_NMCODE_CD , AC_NMCODE_NM , AC_NMCODE_ETC01 , AC_NMCODE_ETC02 , AC_NMCODE_ETC03 , USE_YN , REG_DT , REG_ID , MOD_DT , MOD_ID FROM TB_AC_HQ_NMCODE WHERE HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd}

/* AccountingMainMapper.getAcComCodeDtlList */ SELECT HQ_OFFICE_CD , AC_NMCODE_CD , AC_NMCODE_DTL_CD , AC_NMCODE_DTL_NM , AC_NMCODE_DTL_ETC01 , AC_NMCODE_DTL_ETC02 , AC_NMCODE_DTL_ETC03 , USE_YN , REG_DT , REG_ID , MOD_DT , MOD_ID FROM TB_AC_HQ_NMCODE_DTL WHERE HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND AC_NMCODE_CD = #{acNmcodeCd}
